description_long: This kiosk features a bold, modern design with a predominantly purple and green color scheme. The front is marked by a tall, rounded vertical panel with a large circular logo at the top and a digital display or printed advertisement below, showing a person wearing a t-shirt. The structure forms a U-shaped counter with integrated storage cabinets along the inner walls and a set of hanging rods with several hangers, suggesting a retail or promotional function. The left side panel displays the word 'imagine' in stylized text, while the rear and right sides are more utilitarian, with additional cabinetry and a blue accent panel. The kiosk appears to be constructed from smooth, hard materials, likely plastic or metal, with a glossy finish. There are no visible windows or doors, and the open design allows for easy customer interaction from the front.
description: A modern, U-shaped retail kiosk with a tall, rounded front panel featuring a logo, digital display, and vibrant purple and green colors. Includes storage cabinets, hanging rods, and prominent branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall green panel with a circular logo, digital display, and open counter with hangers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'imagine' branding and the solid purple side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the storage cabinets, computer monitor, and the open counter with hangers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the blue accent panel and the depth of the kiosk's structure.
attribute_signage_type: Illuminated logo and digital display integrated into the tall front panel; 'imagine' printed on left side panel.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with rounded edges, constructed from smooth, glossy material, no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with minimalist and playful branding elements.
